2021-22 Boise State Broncos Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 27-8 (15-3, 1st in MWC MBB)

Rank: 23rd in the Final AP Poll

Coach: Leon Rice

PS/G: 68.3 (256th of 358)

PA/G: 60.9 (13th of 358)

SRS: 11.93 (46th of 358)

SOS: 5.22 (84th of 358)

ORtg: 104.1 (153rd of 358)

DRtg: 92.8 (22nd of 358)

Preseason Odds: Championship +15000

NCAA Tournament: (#8 seed in West)
Lost West First Round (64-53) versus #9 Memphis

  • MWC Reg Season Champ
  • MWC Tourney Champ
